<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 450; 200; 750; 2000; 5000
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 500; 350; 800; 3250; 5000
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Faster Reloading; Geared Up; Frontlines Sniping; Spec Ops
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 3280081327; 3280367022; 3280367963; 3280368786
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 2; 3; 0
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Starter
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 5 || 28 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 4 || 28 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 25 || 4 || 30 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 60 || 4 || 35 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 100 || 3.2 || 45 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 1.65 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 1.3 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 15 || 1.3 || 22.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 14 || 0.5 || 25 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 30 || 0.5 || 30 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
